description_long: This object is a semi-automatic rifle with a wooden stock and forearm, featuring a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The stock is of a traditional fixed design, providing a solid shoulder rest, and the forearm is smoothly contoured for comfortable grip. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine located just ahead of the trigger guard. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, with a front post and a rear notch for aiming. The barrel is of standard length and diameter, ending with a simple muzzle without any visible device attached. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a blend of wood and metal materials giving it a classic, robust look suitable for urban or civilian use.
description: A classic semi-automatic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, black metal receiver and barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design is robust and utilitarian, blending wood and metal for a traditional appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, black receiver, detachable magazine, and standard barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and forearm, with the front sight post visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, black receiver, detachable magazine, and barrel, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the rear sight visible.
